author: viewer-y1
text: This is exactly my problem — Discover Weekly recycles the familiar. It's an echo chamber of the same five artists I already follow.

author: viewer-y2
text: I have ADHD and the firehose of new releases is completely overwhelming. Discovery is way too high-effort to keep up with.

author: viewer-y3
text: Power digger here. I want deep cuts and obscure artists below a certain popularity, but the algorithm plays it way too safe.

author: viewer-y4
text: New music never sticks for me. I play a recommended song once and forget it — it never makes it into my rotation.

author: viewer-y5
text: I'd love a guided on-ramp to get into classical. Stage it for me week by week instead of one giant intimidating playlist.

author: viewer-y6
text: Honestly when a recommendation explains why a track fits my taste, I trust it so much more. The 'why' is everything.

author: viewer-y7
text: I just want a control slider — comfort versus curiosity — instead of a fixed algorithm deciding how adventurous I get.

author: viewer-y8
text: Stuck on repeat with the same comfort songs. The app never gently nudges me to expand my rotation.
